title: Test Implement `bead claims --plain` CLI Mode

handoff_summary.completed:
Ran targeted tests with `PYTHONPATH=src`:
- `test_active_claims_report_in_progress_scope`
- `test_cli_claims_defaults_to_json_output`
- `test_cli_claims_plain_outputs_compact_lines`
- `test_cli_claims_plain_empty_state`
- `test_build_parser_accepts_bead_claims_plain_flag`
- `test_build_parser_rejects_scheduler_for_bead_create_agent`
- `test_build_parser_rejects_scheduler_for_handoff_target`
All passed.
Applied minimal test-enablement fix: added missing `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py` so local imports resolve and tests can execute against this worktree.
handoff_summary.remaining: No additional tester-scope coverage gaps found for the `--plain` claims CLI mode in current tests.
handoff_summary.risks: Without `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py` in this worktree, imports fail before tests run; this environment issue can mask CLI regressions.
handoff_summary.next_action: Review/integrate the test-enablement file addition and proceed to normal review/merge flow.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Potential overlap if another in-flight bead also adds/edits `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py`; reconcile versions before merge.

conflict_risks: Potential overlap if another in-flight bead also adds/edits `src/codex_orchestrator/skills.py`; reconcile versions before merge.

guardrails.template_text:
# Tester Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Add or update automated tests, run validation, and report defects or missing coverage.

Allowed actions:
- Write or update tests relevant to the assigned bead.
- Run targeted checks and summarize failures clearly.
- Make minimal test-enablement fixes only when strictly necessary to execute or stabilize the tests.

Disallowed actions:
- Implement feature logic beyond minimal test-enablement work.
- Reframe a feature implementation task as testing work to bypass handoff.
- Perform review signoff or broad documentation rewrites.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON describing test coverage, validation status, and follow-up needs.
- Precise defect or coverage notes when the bead cannot be completed within tester scope.

handoff_summary.block_reason: Unsupported agent type for worker prompt: scheduler

last_agent_result.summary: Validated `bead claims --plain` behavior with focused automated tests; parser flag acceptance and plain/json output paths pass.
